name: codeguardian-ai
description: An AI-powered debugging companion for VS Code with real-time suggestions, clear explanations, and secure backend support.

commands.title: CodeGuardian AI: Apply All Quick Fixes
CodeGuardian AI: Set Gemini API Key
CodeGuardian AI: Validate Gemini API Key
CodeGuardian AI: Clear Gemini API Key
CodeGuardian AI: Mark Suggestion Not Helpful

codeguardian.serverUrl.description: Base URL for the CodeGuardian backend when backendMode is set to server.

codeguardian.serverToken.description: Bearer token for the CodeGuardian backend API. Leave empty for localhost demo mode.

codeguardian.backendMode.description: Choose where CodeGuardian performs analysis. Use gemini to run analysis through Google Gemini API.

codeguardian.geminiModel.description: Gemini model used for CodeGuardian analysis when backendMode is gemini.

codeguardian.promptForGeminiKeyOnStartup.description: Prompt for a Gemini API key when CodeGuardian activates in gemini mode.

codeguardian.analysisDebounceMs.description: Delay before re-running analysis after a document edit.

codeguardian.enableConsoleLogHints.description: Show low-severity hints for debug output like console.log, print, and System.out.println.

scripts.verify: node --check src/extension.js && node --check src/providers/codeActionProvider.js && node --check src/providers/hoverProvider.js && node --check src/providers/suggestionViewProvider.js && node --check src/services/analysisService.js && node --check src/services/diagnosticUtils.js && node --check src/services/suggestionUtils.js && node --check src/state/sessionStore.js && node --check server/index.js && node --check server/app.js && node --check server/services/feedbackStore.js && node --check server/services/llmClient.js && node --check lib/analyzer.js && node --check media/sidebar.js
